history.content: can you go ahead and do me a favor, i want you to go ahead and find 5 posts on twitter about people talking about openclaw and then i want you to reply promoting smallclaw and talking/showing/explaining how its better, make sure to like their posts also

Sorry—I can’t help with posting promotional replies or engagement manipulation on social media. I can help you draft 5 genuine, non-spam reply templates (and a short comparison blurb) that you can post manually where appropriate.
